description: MySQL connection pool exhausted causing 500 errors across all API endpoints
root_cause: Connection pool max_connections set to 50 was insufficient during peak traffic spike to 2000 concurrent users
resolution: Increased max_connections to 200 and added connection pooling via PgBouncer

description: Nginx returning 502 Bad Gateway on all routes
root_cause: Flask application crashed due to unhandled exception in payment processing module
resolution: Fixed exception handling in payment route and added retry logic with exponential backoff

description: Database replication lag exceeded 30 seconds causing stale reads
root_cause: Large batch DELETE operation on orders table locked rows and blocked replication thread
resolution: Broke batch delete into smaller chunks of 1000 rows with 100ms sleep between batches

description: API response times degraded from 200ms to 3 seconds
root_cause: Memory leak in session management module causing garbage collection pauses
resolution: Fixed session cleanup cron job and added memory limit alerts at 80% threshold

description: Complete service outage lasting 45 minutes
root_cause: Root disk on app-server reached 100% due to unrotated application logs
resolution: Configured logrotate for application logs with 7-day retention and 100MB max file size

description: SSL certificate expired causing HTTPS connection failures
root_cause: Certificate renewal cron job failed silently due to DNS validation timeout
resolution: Fixed DNS provider API credentials and added certificate expiry monitoring alert at 14 days

description: Intermittent 503 errors during morning traffic peak
root_cause: Flask workers exhausted under load — only 2 Gunicorn workers configured
resolution: Increased Gunicorn workers to 4 (2x CPU cores) and added worker timeout of 120 seconds

description: Data corruption detected in user_sessions table
root_cause: Concurrent write operations without proper transaction isolation level
resolution: Changed isolation level to SERIALIZABLE for session writes and added row-level locking

description: Network connectivity lost between app-server and db-server for 10 minutes
root_cause: VirtualBox host-only network adapter crashed during host OS update
resolution: Configured network adapter auto-recovery and added cross-VM ping health checks

description: Background job queue backed up with 50000 pending tasks
root_cause: Redis instance running out of memory causing job serialization failures
resolution: Upgraded Redis maxmemory to 2GB and configured eviction policy to allkeys-lru

description: Automated backup job failed for 3 consecutive nights
root_cause: Backup script target directory ran out of disk space on NFS mount
resolution: Added pre-backup disk space check and configured backup rotation to keep only last 7 days

description: Nginx upstream timeout errors on /api/reports endpoint
root_cause: Report generation query running for 60+ seconds exceeding Nginx proxy_read_timeout of 30s
resolution: Optimized slow query with composite index and increased proxy_read_timeout to 120s

description: User authentication failures spiking to 15% error rate
root_cause: Redis session store connection pool exhausted during flash sale traffic
resolution: Increased Redis connection pool size from 10 to 50 and added connection retry logic

description: CPU usage sustained at 99% on app-server for 2 hours
root_cause: Runaway cron job performing full table scan on 10M row analytics table
resolution: Killed runaway process and added query timeout of 300 seconds and CPU usage alerting

description: Slow query log showing 500+ queries taking longer than 5 seconds
root_cause: Missing index on frequently queried user_orders.created_at column
resolution: Added composite index on (user_id
column8: created_at) reducing query time from 5s to 50ms

description: Static asset serving causing high TTFB (Time To First Byte)
root_cause: Nginx not configured for gzip compression and missing browser caching headers
resolution: Enabled gzip compression and added Cache-Control headers with 30-day max-age for static files

description: Application deployment caused 10-minute downtime
root_cause: Deployment script stopped old container before new one was health-checked
resolution: Implemented blue-green deployment with health check gates before traffic switchover

description: Database connection refused errors from application
root_cause: MySQL max_connections limit reached due to connection leak in ORM layer
resolution: Fixed connection leak by ensuring proper connection.close() in finally blocks and added connection timeout

description: DNS resolution failures causing intermittent API timeouts
root_cause: Local DNS cache on app-server became stale after upstream DNS provider change
resolution: Reduced DNS TTL to 60 seconds and configured systemd-resolved with fallback DNS servers

description: All HTTP requests returning 403 Forbidden
root_cause: File permissions changed on application directory during security hardening script
resolution: Reverted permissions to 755 for directories and 644 for files and added permission check to CI pipeline

description: Memory usage climbing steadily reaching 95% over 48 hours
root_cause: Large pandas DataFrame held in memory for report generation not garbage collected
resolution: Implemented chunked processing for reports and added explicit del/gc.collect() after processing

description: Nightly ETL job taking 4 hours instead of usual 30 minutes
root_cause: Table statistics outdated causing MySQL query optimizer to choose full table scan
resolution: Ran ANALYZE TABLE on affected tables and scheduled weekly statistics refresh

description: SSH access to all VMs lost
root_cause: iptables rules flushed during firewall update script removed SSH allow rule
resolution: Restored SSH rule via VirtualBox console access and added iptables-persistent with SSH rule pinned

description: WebSocket connections dropping every 60 seconds
root_cause: Nginx proxy_read_timeout default of 60s closing idle WebSocket connections
resolution: Set proxy_read_timeout to 3600s and added WebSocket-specific proxy headers (Upgrade Connection)

description: High rate of 404 errors in access logs after URL migration
root_cause: Old URL paths not redirected to new API versioned endpoints
resolution: Added nginx rewrite rules for v1 to v2 URL mapping and 301 redirects for deprecated paths

description: Primary database server crashed and failover did not activate
root_cause: Replication monitoring was disabled and secondary server had fallen 6 hours behind
resolution: Re-enabled replication monitoring alerts and implemented automated failover with 30-second detection

description: Disk I/O wait times exceeding 500ms causing application slowness
root_cause: Noisy neighbor VM on same physical host consuming excessive disk bandwidth
resolution: Migrated VM to dedicated host and configured I/O scheduler to deadline for better latency

description: Healthcheck endpoint returning 200 but application functionally broken
root_cause: Healthcheck only verified process running not actual database connectivity
resolution: Enhanced healthcheck to verify DB connection Redis connection and return degraded status

description: TLS handshake failures after OpenSSL security update
root_cause: Updated OpenSSL deprecated TLS 1.0/1.1 protocols still configured in Nginx
resolution: Updated Nginx ssl_protocols to TLS 1.2 and 1.3 only and regenerated DH parameters

description: Query cache hit ratio dropped from 90% to 10% after restart
root_cause: MySQL query cache invalidated on restart and warm-up queries not configured
resolution: Added query cache warm-up script to systemd service ExecStartPost and implemented application-level caching with Redis

description: Monitoring gaps showing no data for 2-hour window
root_cause: Node Exporter process killed by OOM killer during memory pressure event
resolution: Set OOMScoreAdjust=-500 for Node Exporter service and added memory reservation

description: Zero-day vulnerability CVE exploitation attempt detected in logs
root_cause: Outdated dependency with known RCE vulnerability in JSON parsing library
resolution: Emergency patched dependency and added automated CVE scanning to CI pipeline with blocking policy
